dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7714 IH: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 101 North Colorado Street in Chandler, Arizona, as the “Mayor Coy Payne Memorial Post Office Building”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Stanton (for himself and Ms. Ansari) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 101 North Colorado Street in Chandler, Arizona, as the Mayor Coy Payne Memorial Post Office Building.

section.header: Mayor Coy Payne Memorial Post Office Building

subsection.text: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 101 North Colorado Street in Chandler, Arizona, shall be known and designated as the Mayor Coy Payne Memorial Post Office Building.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the Mayor Coy Payne Memorial Post Office Building.
